title: Pure Mayhem
description: the modpack where chaos is the entire point
body:
welcome to pure mayhem, the modpack where chaos isn’t just a feature—it’s the whole point. if you ever thought minecraft needed more unpredictability, more nonsense, and more “what the heck just happened,” you’re in the right place. this is the kitchen sink, the blender, and the entire pantry thrown into one world, then set on fire for good measure.

pure mayhem is built around my own mod, pure chaos, which adds things nobody asked for (and probably nobody wanted), like the infamous testicle on a stick. but why stop there? we’ve packed in the entropy chaos mod and a whole bunch of other stuff that crank the randomness up to eleven. mobs do weird things, items behave in ways you never expected, and the world itself seems to have a mind of its own (and it’s not a very stable one).

## features

*   pure chaos mod: the heart of the madness, with bizarre items, events, and mechanics
*   entropy chaos mod: because the universe wasn’t falling apart fast enough
*   a wild mix of mods for total unpredictability—expect the unexpected, then expect more random events,           random mobs, random everything
*   kitchen sink? more like kitchen explosion
*   bugs, glitches, and features that blur the line between the three
*   pure, unfiltered mayhem every time you load up your world

this pack is not for the faint of heart or the lovers of order. it’s for the brave, the curious, and the slightly unhinged. play solo if you dare, or bring friends and see who loses their mind first.

no two playthroughs are the same, and honestly, that’s probably for the best.
